name: @forgeax/hello-gltf
description: feat-20260515-gltf-loader-via-asset-system M5 convergence app - Tier-B BoxTextured fork (single mesh POSITION + INDICES + UnlitMaterial baseColor + Camera perspective). End-to-end proof of charter P4 consistent abstraction: AI users discover the same loadByGuid<SceneAsset> + sceneInstances.instantiate path the hello-room app uses, with the only difference being the disk-schema sidecar (<source>.meta.json, assetType=gltf, e.g. box.gltf.meta.json) coming from forgeax-engine-remote-gltf import instead of a hand-written .pack.json.

forgeax._comment: smokeInvocation = hello-gltf SSOT for AC-14. Literal `pnpm --filter @forgeax/hello-gltf smoke` must match byte-for-byte across apps/hello/gltf/package.json#forgeax.smokeInvocation + .github/workflows/ci.yml + AGENTS.md#Smoke-gate (charter P4 consistent abstraction; mirror of hello-room#forgeax.smokeInvocation).

bundle-size.reason: vite app bundle (dist/assets) shape is downstream of @forgeax/engine-runtime + @forgeax/engine-rhi-webgpu + @forgeax/engine-gltf sizes already tracked at the package level

fps.reason: hello-triangle baseline anchor only; hello-gltf smoke covers 300-frame Tier-B GPU path (AC-14)

bench.reason: convergence integration app; bench focus stays on @forgeax/engine-math + @forgeax/engine-ecs

spike-report.reason: not a spike app; gltf importer ships a runtime parser bundle (@forgeax/engine-gltf) with bundle-size locked at the package level
